name: City of Pineville Elk River Access
facilities: Concrete/gravel boat ramp, parking, public restrooms; city access opened spring 2010; ~0.15 mi river frontage.
description: Datum WGS84 (OSM). This is the developed town launch at the Business 71 (old US-71 / Hwy 71B) bridge in Pineville, ~0.7 mi upstream of the main US-71/I-49 bridge.

name: US-71 Bridge (I-49) Access
facilities: Main highway (US-71 / I-49) bridge crossing. As a freeway span, the usable put-in is the river road / gravel bar on the south side near Kozy Kamp (private); the bridge itself is the mile-24.5 reference point.
description: Datum WGS84 (OSM). US-71 through here is now co-signed I-49; this is the crossing referred to historically as the 'US-71 bridge'. Located ~0.7 mi downstream of the City of Pineville access.

name: Mount Shira Access
facilities: 26-acre MDC area; gravel boat launch, large parking lot, restrooms, wheelchair-accessible trail. 2 mi north of Noel on Hwy 59; right bank, ~mile 32.
description: Datum WGS84 (OSM). Sources converge on the access location (36.576-36.578, -94.462 to -94.464); exact gravel-ramp point on the bank not individually mapped, so confidence is medium. Do NOT confuse with the private 'Trestle Park / Elk River Floats' launch ~1.1 km NE at the Elk Springs Road bridge (36.5859, -94.4547).

name: Noel / Shadow Lake Access (Hwy 59 bridge)
facilities: Public MO-59 Elk River bridge at Noel next to Shadow Lake; town take-out above the Shadow Lake low-water dam. City park / ball-field frontage sits ~150-300 m NE (Shadow Lake reservoir ~36.5495, -94.4904).
description: Datum WGS84 (OSM). The specific Noel City Park boat ramp is NOT authoritatively geocoded in any source found (no MDC/OSM ramp node); the Noel riverfront is otherwise private outfitters (Wayside, River Ranch, Two Sons, etc.). Coordinate given is the verified on-river public Hwy 59 bridge crossing that serves as the public put-in/take-out. Ownership of the bridge itself is MoDOT; the adjacent access frontage is City of Noel.

name: Sycamore Landing
facilities: Private riverfront campground / float launch for River Ranch guests.
description: Excluded from public-access set per instructions (private outfitter/resort). lat/lon left null; no public coordinate applicable. Flag if the app owner actually wants the private launch point plotted.

name: Cowskin Access
facilities: MDC access with parking lot and concrete boat ramp; mostly forested, small mowed field, no gravel bars. At the MO-43 Elk River bridge; USGS Tiff City streamgage is co-located.
description: Datum WGS84 (OSM) / NAD83 (USGS) — equivalent to <1 m here. Lowermost MO public access before the Oklahoma line / Grand Lake.

name: Lanagan Access
facilities: MDC public access with boat ramp/slipway on the Elk River at Lanagan.
description: Datum WGS84 (OSM). Not in the original request list but a legitimate MDC public access; sits between the US-71 bridge (mile ~24.5) and Mount Shira (mile ~32), roughly river mile 28-30 (approximate, not authoritatively measured).
